# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AudioOccludedEventHandler delegate

Emitted when the audio becomes occluded by one or more walls.

```csharp
public delegate void AudioOccludedEventHandler(Node3D listener, int wallCount);
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| listener | The object that is receiving sound. |
| wallCount | Number of walls involved. |
